calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Mar-09-2026 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Mar-09-2026 Judgment Entered

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order That Matters In Request For Admission Of Truth Of Facts Be Deemed Admitted; Memorandum In Support Of Motion; Declaration In Support Of Motion
Off Calendar Dec-29-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Plaintiff JPMorgan Chase Bank, N.A.'s unopposed Motion For Order That Matters In Request For Admission Of Truth Of Facts Be Deemed Admitted is GRANTED.

The record demonstrates Plaintiff properly served Requests for Admission and Defendant Olessya Povtar did not provide any responses to Plaintiff's requests. (See Code of Civil Procedure section 2033.280.) Defendant's failure to timely respond is not excused. No meet and confer requirement when no responses have been provided.

Plaintiff's RFAs, Set One, served July 10, 2025, are deemed admitted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the court's ruling and must drop a hard courtesy copy in Dept. 302's inbox.
Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order That Matters In Request For Admission Of Truth Of Facts Be Deemed Admitted; Memorandum In Support Of Motion; Declaration In Support Of Motion
Off Calendar Dec-16-2025 Continued To Dec-29-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A.'S Motion For Order That Matters In Request For Admission Of Truth Of Facts Be Deemed Admitted.

Continued on the court's own motion to be heard December 29, 2025.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
